userRoles.name: ProjectManager
userRoles.description: Manages projects and has full control over project-related actions.

userRoles.name: TeamMember
userRoles.description: Participates in projects and has limited access to project-related actions.

content.text: Overview and data management for task.
Manage file records and open the create dialog when new data is needed.
Manage task records and open the create dialog when new data is needed.
Manage delivery records and open the create dialog when new data is needed.
Manage project records and open the create dialog when new data is needed.
Manage feedback records and open the create dialog when new data is needed.
